task_title: The email report script is crashing

scores.justification: Agent explicitly used `--limit 1000` in the jq command to retrieve all users beyond the default 10-row page, ensuring all 50 users were examined.
Agent identified and displayed all three users with null emails: u023 (Kai Ito), u031 (Eden Gomez), and u049 (Wren Adler) in the jq output.
Agent explicitly explained that calling `.lower()` on `None` raises `AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'lower'`, directly connecting the null values to the crash.
Agent recommended two concrete solutions: filtering with `if u.get("email")` in Python and using `select(.email != null)` in jq, both of which skip null emails before processing.
